compiled_state.title: Write RED unit tests for tokens_merge: visual section update with behavioral preservation
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Write failing pytest unit tests for the tokens_merge submodule before implementation.

## testing_mode: RED — new source file.

## tokens.md section structure
The tokens.md (Design System Tokens Applied) file has sections:
- Visual sections (to be updated from Figma): Component Inventory, Visual Properties (fills, strokes, sizes, positions)
- Behavioral sections (to be preserved): Interaction Behaviors, Responsive Rules, Accessibility Specification, State Definitions

## Test Cases (Given/When/Then)
- TM-1: Given a tokens.md with visual properties section and Figma-derived data, when merge_tokens() runs, then the visual properties section is updated with new fills/sizes from Figma
- TM-2: Given a tokens.md with 'Interaction Behaviors' section content, when merge_tokens() runs, then Interaction Behaviors section is identical in output (preserved verbatim)
- TM-3: Given a tokens.md with 'Responsive Rules' section, when merge_tokens() runs, then Responsive Rules section is identical in output
- TM-4: Given a tokens.md with 'Accessibility Specification' section, when merge_tokens() runs, then Accessibility Specification is identical in output
- TM-5: Given a tokens.md with 'State Definitions' section, when merge_tokens() runs, then State Definitions is identical in output
- TM-6: Given a designer-added component (tag=NEW), when merge_tokens() runs, then a new entry with INCOMPLETE behavioral spec placeholder is added to tokens.md
- TM-7: Given a designer-removed component entry in tokens.md, when merge_tokens() runs, then that component's token entries are removed from the output

## Files to Create
- tests/unit/test_figma_merge_tokens.py

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/unit/test_figma_merge_tokens.py exists with TM-1 through TM-7
  Verify: for t in TM-1 TM-2 TM-3 TM-4 TM-5 TM-6 TM-7; do grep -q "$t" tests/unit/test_figma_merge_tokens.py || exit 1; done
- [ ] pytest exits non-zero (RED)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/unit/test_figma_merge_tokens.py; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
